creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Moin moin 

Upstream deprecated freetype-config. 

Software can just use the pkg-config tool to get the same information.

print/texlive-base has been adapted to this in 2e8a7f6a4674d4ee40da1553a19047481f0c6c63 


What issue are you experiencing? Do you have some error message / logfiles?


mfg Tobias
